title: Monkey Code Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Monkey Code OpenCode plugin

$schema.description: JSON schema reference for editor validation and autocomplete

agents.description: Configuration for monkey agents. Main agents: punch (all-in-one), caesar (planning), harambe (critic), george (creative). Generic sub-agents: tasker (atomic tasks), scout (skill/mcp exploration), builder (code components)

punch.description: All-in-one feature completer - default agent for end-to-end tasks

caesar.description: Planning mode - strategic analysis and architecture design

harambe.description: Critic and analyst - code review, analysis, and quality assessment

george.description: Creative expert - design, UX, and creative problem solving

tasker.description: Generic sub-agent - atomic tasks and small implementations

scout.description: Generic sub-agent - skill/mcp loading and exploration

builder.description: Generic sub-agent - FE components and code blocks

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of concurrent background tasks

pollInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds to check for background task updates

sqlite.description: SQLite database configuration for vector memory

path.description: Custom path to SQLite database file

maxMemoryItems.description: Maximum number of memory items to store

tmux.description: TMUX configuration for interactive bash sessions

caveman.description: Caveman/wenyan token compression mode. When enabled, agents respond in compressed caveman-style prose to reduce token usage.

enabled.description: Enable caveman compression mode for all agents

agentConfig.description: Configuration for an individual monkey agent

topP.description: Nucleus sampling probability (0 = only top token, 1 = all tokens)

topK.description: Top-k sampling limit (number of highest probability tokens to consider)

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response

presencePenalty.description: Penalty for repeating tokens already present in the text (-2 to 2)

frequencyPenalty.description: Penalty for repeating tokens based on their frequency (-2 to 2)

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level for OpenAI models

thinking.description: Extended thinking configuration for Anthropic models

budgetTokens.description: Maximum tokens to allocate for thinking

providerOptions.description: Provider-specific options passed directly to the model API
